cards.name: Laser Volley

cards.name: Cybernetic Enhancement
cards.reason: Grants Ward 2 and +2/+2; turns any creature into a threat

cards.name: Gravity Well
cards.reason: Keeps a threat locked down while filtering your next draws

cards.name: Black Hole Singularity
cards.reason: Exiles creatures to bypass graveyard strategies

cards.name: Sothera's Breath
cards.reason: Massive stats boost and grants trample to close out games

cards.name: Orbital Strike
cards.reason: Versatile removal for artifacts or high-power creatures
